title: Vistra Energy: Free Cash Flow Fuels Buybacks Which Fuels Dividend Growth
text: VST is a unique hybrid utility based in Texas but with assets in the Midwest and California as well. VST is closing coal plants and replacing them with solar + battery storage assets, thereby replacing carbon credit fees with beneficial green tax credits.

title: Vista Energy: A Booming Buy With A Strong Upside Potential
text: Vista Energy: A Booming Buy With A Strong Upside Potential
